query:
INSERT INTO badges (name, iconUrl, description) VALUES
('Legend', '/badges/legend.png', 'Industry legend with iconic status'),
('Anal Queen', '/badges/anal-queen.png', 'Specialist in anal performances'),
('Super Slut', '/badges/super-slut.png', 'Versatile performer'),
('Extreme', '/badges/extreme.png', 'Extreme and hardcore performances'),
('Girl Next Door', '/badges/girl-next-door.png', 'Approachable and relatable'),
('Rising Star', '/badges/rising-star.png', 'New talent on the rise'),
('Hall of Fame', '/badges/hall-of-fame.png', 'Hall of Fame inductee'),
('Specialist', '/badges/specialist.png', 'Specialized performer'),
('MILF', '/badges/milf.png', 'Mature performer')
ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE iconUrl=VALUES(iconUrl), description=VALUES(description);
